abstract: The session is paused and has temporarily stopped streaming from a streaming endpoint.
overview:
## Discussion

This state is similar to [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/Status-swift.enum/disconnected(_:)], except that reconnecting to the streaming endpoint from this state gaurantees that the person doesn’t have to re-pair with the streaming endpoint.

You can reconnect to the streaming endpoint from this state by calling [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/resume()].

# FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.paused

**Case**

The session is paused and has temporarily stopped streaming from a streaming endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
case paused
```

## Discussion

This state is similar to [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/Status-swift.enum/disconnected(_:)], except that reconnecting to the streaming endpoint from this state gaurantees that the person doesn’t have to re-pair with the streaming endpoint.

You can reconnect to the streaming endpoint from this state by calling [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/resume()].
title: FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.paused
